versioning.title: Versioning
versioning.description: Version control and export your project.

versioning.no_commits_description: Commit your first version to start tracking changes.

versioning.requires_backend_description: Version history, commits, and restore features are available when connected to a Linkr server. In local mode, you can still export and import your data as a ZIP archive.

wiki.title: Wiki
wiki.description: Hierarchical markdown documentation for your team.

app_warehouse.title: Data Warehouse
app_warehouse.description: Manage databases, schema presets, concept mappings, and ETL pipelines.
app_warehouse.databases_placeholder: Database management will be available here.
app_warehouse.concept_mapping_description: Map source concepts to standard vocabularies (SNOMED, LOINC, RxNorm) using OHDSI Athena and UMLS dictionaries.
app_warehouse.data_quality_description: Create and manage data quality checks, validation rules, and quality reports for your data sources.
app_warehouse.etl_description: Build and manage Extract-Transform-Load pipelines to convert source data into OMOP CDM format.

app_warehouse.no_available_databases_description: Create a new database first from the Data Warehouse page.

app_warehouse.unlink_confirm_description: Unlink this database from the project? The database will remain available in the Data Warehouse.

app_versioning.title: Versioning
app_versioning.description: Version control for your workspace: wiki pages, configuration, and plugins.
app_versioning.no_commits_description: Changes to wiki pages, plugins, schema presets, and databases are automatically versioned.
app_versioning.no_results_description: Try adjusting your search or date filters.
app_versioning.restore_description: This will restore all workspace content (wiki, plugins, schemas, databases) to the state at commit "{{message}}" ({{hash}}). A new commit will be created to record this restore.
app_versioning.restore_entity_description: This will restore "{{name}}" to the state at commit "{{message}}" ({{hash}}). Other entities will not be affected. A new commit will be created.
app_versioning.no_entity_commits_description: Changes will appear here after the first save.
app_versioning.export_description: Download your workspace content as a ZIP archive. Select which sections to include.
app_versioning.export_projects_hint: Projects are exported as catalog entries only (metadata + README). Full project content should be versioned via each project's own git repository.
app_versioning.export_credentials_off_hint: Only database names and schema mappings are exported. Connection details are excluded.
app_versioning.export_credentials_on_hint: Connection details (host, port, database, schema, username) will be included. Passwords are never exported.
app_versioning.export_credentials_confirm_body: You are about to export database connection details. Make sure this archive will not be shared publicly.
app_versioning.export_credentials_confirm_included: Included: host, port, database name, schema, username
app_versioning.import_description: Restore a workspace from a ZIP archive. This will import all projects, wiki pages, SQL scripts, ETL pipelines, and other workspace content.

concept_mapping.title: Concept Mapping
concept_mapping.description: Map source clinical concepts to standard OMOP vocabularies.
concept_mapping.new_project_description: Create a new concept mapping project from a database or an imported file.
concept_mapping.project_desc_placeholder: Describe the scope and purpose of this mapping project…
concept_mapping.no_projects_description: Create a mapping project to start mapping source concepts to standard vocabularies.
concept_mapping.delete_confirm_description: This will permanently delete the project "{{name}}" and all its mappings. This action cannot be undone.
concept_mapping.cs_description: Import and manage OHDSI concept sets used for mapping targets.
concept_mapping.cs_empty: No concept sets linked to this project yet. Import one to get started.
concept_mapping.cs_delete_description: This will permanently delete the concept set "{{name}}". This action cannot be undone.
concept_mapping.cs_import_description: Import an OHDSI concept set from a JSON file or URL.
concept_mapping.cs_import_url_hint: Raw GitHub URL to an OHDSI concept set JSON file, e.g. from indicate-eu/data-dictionary-content
concept_mapping.cs_ref_indicate_desc: Concept sets from the INDICATE European project data dictionary.
concept_mapping.cs_import_invalid: Invalid concept set JSON. Expected OHDSI format with expression.items array.
concept_mapping.vocab_ref_description: Import OHDSI vocabulary files (ATHENA) to search all standard concepts beyond concept sets.
concept_mapping.vocab_browse_empty: Import a vocabulary reference first to browse concepts here.
concept_mapping.no_datasource: No database linked to this mapping project.
concept_mapping.no_schema: This database has no schema mapping configured. Set up a schema preset first.
concept_mapping.no_concept_tables: The schema preset for this database does not define any concept dictionaries. Configure concept tables in the schema preset.
concept_mapping.select_source: Select a source concept from the left panel to view and create mappings.
concept_mapping.browse_target_hint: Browse target concepts while no source concept is selected.
concept_mapping.browse_pick_cs: Select a concept set to browse its concepts.
concept_mapping.search_hint: Type a concept name and press Enter to search
concept_mapping.prog_empty: No mappings yet. Go to the Mapping Editor tab to start mapping concepts.
concept_mapping.export_include_ignored_desc: Adds ignored concepts as unmapped rows (SSSOM: NoTermFound, Usagi: IGNORED)
concept_mapping.export_empty: No mappings to export yet. Create some mappings first.
concept_mapping.export_usagi_desc: Compatible with OHDSI Usagi tool. Standard format for sharing concept mappings.
concept_mapping.export_stcm_desc: OMOP CDM table format. Ready for direct import into your ETL pipeline.
concept_mapping.export_sssom_desc: Simple Standard for Sharing Ontological Mappings. Interoperable with other ontology tools.
concept_mapping.export_json_desc: Complete export with all metadata. Use for backup, sharing, or re-import.
concept_mapping.export_source_csv_desc: Exported source concepts as imported (mapped columns only). Useful to share the concept dictionary alongside mappings.
concept_mapping.export_source_csv_db_desc: Export all source concepts from the connected database. Includes vocabulary ID, concept code, name, and optional category columns.
concept_mapping.cs_bulk_delete_description: This will permanently delete {{count}} concept sets. This action cannot be undone.
concept_mapping.cs_delete_batch: Delete all concept sets from this import
concept_mapping.cs_batch_delete_description: This will permanently delete all concept sets from this import batch. This action cannot be undone.
concept_mapping.cs_detail_resolved_unavailable: Resolved concepts are not available for this concept set.
concept_mapping.cs_detail_statistics_coming_soon_desc: Record counts, patient counts, and distribution charts for this concept set will be available in a future update.
concept_mapping.cs_detail_no_description: No description available for this concept set.
concept_mapping.delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} mapping(s)? This action cannot be undone.
concept_mapping.vocab_import_hint: Select a folder containing ATHENA vocabulary files (CSV or Parquet). At minimum, the CONCEPT table is required.
concept_mapping.vocab_import_missing_concept: CONCEPT file is required (CONCEPT.csv or concept.parquet).
concept_mapping.vocab_remove_desc: This will remove the vocabulary reference database from this project. The vocabulary files will be deleted from browser storage.
concept_mapping.file_drop_hint: Drag & drop a file or click to browse
concept_mapping.column_mapping_hint: Map file columns to concept fields. At least concept name or concept code is required.
concept_mapping.no_file_data: No file data available for this project.
concept_mapping.detail_no_info: No additional information available for this concept.
concept_mapping.import_settings_description: Configure how the file is parsed and map columns to concept fields.
concept_mapping.no_concept_sets_hint: No concept sets linked yet. Import concept sets to browse and map target concepts.
concept_mapping.no_vocab_for_search_hint: No vocabulary reference available. Import a vocabulary or concept sets to enable concept search.
concept_mapping.projects_widget_description: Work on individual mapping projects. Each project maps source concepts from one database or file to standard OMOP vocabularies.
concept_mapping.global_widget_description: Aggregated statistics and coverage across all mapping projects. Compare progress, group by badge or project, and export consolidated results.
concept_mapping.source_id_info: Assign stable OMOP custom source concept IDs to file-based projects without a concept ID column. IDs are deterministic per (vocabulary, code) pair and persist across reloads.
concept_mapping.source_id_empty: No badge ranges configured. Add a badge below to get started.
concept_mapping.source_id_empty_no_badges: No badges found across your mapping projects. Add badges to your projects first, then configure a source concept ID range for each one here.
concept_mapping.source_id_add_badge: Add a badge to configure its range:
concept_mapping.source_id_error_order: End must be greater than start.
concept_mapping.source_id_error_overlap: This range overlaps with another badge.
concept_mapping.source_id_reset_confirm_desc: All assigned source concept IDs for "{{badge}}" will be deleted and reassigned from the range start on next assignment. This cannot be undone.
concept_mapping.source_id_reset_all_confirm_desc: All assigned source concept IDs for all badges will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

data_catalog.title: Data Catalog
data_catalog.description: Create and manage data catalogs with concept breakdowns for your databases.
data_catalog.no_catalogs_description: Create your first data catalog to explore and export concept breakdowns from your databases.
data_catalog.delete_description: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and all its computed results. This action cannot be undone.
data_catalog.name: Name
data_catalog.detail_coming_soon_description: Configuration, data preview, anonymization, DCAT-AP metadata, and export will be available here.
data_catalog.dimensions_description: Configure which demographic dimensions to include in the catalog breakdown.
data_catalog.no_type_column: no type column in schema mapping
data_catalog.no_unit_column: no unit column in schema mapping
data_catalog.classification_description: Select which columns from the concept dictionary to use as category and subcategory.
data_catalog.anonymization_description: Set the minimum patient count per row. Rows below this threshold will be suppressed on export.
data_catalog.no_data_description: Go to the Configuration tab and click Compute to generate the catalog data.
data_catalog.no_dimensions_enabled: No dimensions enabled. Go to Configuration to enable at least one dimension.
data_catalog.anon_threshold_description: Controls how rows with fewer patients than the threshold are handled on export.
data_catalog.anon_replace_hint: Rows below {{threshold}} patients will show "< {{threshold}}" instead of the actual count. All rows are kept.
data_catalog.anon_suppress_hint: Rows below the threshold will be completely removed from the export.
data_catalog.export_html_description: Download a standalone HTML file with dashboard charts, filterable data table, and embedded Health-DCAT-AP metadata (JSON-LD).
data_catalog.export_zip_contents: ZIP contains: catalog.html, concepts.csv, dimensions.csv, metadata.jsonld
data_catalog.period_reliability_warning: Too many masked subgroups — increase granularity (month → quarter → year)

dcat.dataset_hdab_desc: Health Data Access Body handling access requests
dcat.dataset_theme_desc: Topics or themes of the dataset
dcat.dataset_frequency_desc: How often the dataset is updated
